blocks.content: I'd been there the whole time. Standing a few feet back. Daniel had seen me.
Not when he was focused on Jonathan. But after — when he turned to walk away. His eyes cut to me for half a second. Filing something.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: Yeah. You're not bothered by that at all?

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: He pressed you in the middle of the hallway.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: He tried. There's a difference. Pressing somebody means you had a chance of getting somewhere.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: He's not gonna let it go.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: He can hold on to it as long as he wants. Doesn't change anything.
In Episode 1 Daniel had pressed ME in that hallway and I'd had to think about what to do. I'd had four choices and a racing heart. Jonathan hadn't thought for a single second.
I didn't know yet whether that was something you built or something you were born with.

blocks.prompt: Daniel clocked you watching the whole thing.

options.label: "He saw me. He's going to come back to me instead."
"You're probably right. He'll find something else."
"How do you do that? Just — not feel it?"
